instructions: Provide complete inventory of N5 bootstrap results
List all files created with sizes and timestamps
Confirm all schemas are valid JSON
Report any gaps or incomplete items

requested_data.directory_tree: Full N5/ tree with file sizes
requested_data.file_manifest: List of all files with: path, size, modified date, sha256
requested_data.script_status: Which scripts exist and are executable
requested_data.schema_validation: All schemas parse as valid JSON
requested_data.knowledge_files: List all Knowledge/ files with line counts
functional_tests: Can you execute: python3 N5/scripts/n5_health_check.py (if exists)

content.format: Detailed JSON response with verification results
